label: Overview
description: High-level summary — pages, issues, scores, status

label: AI Readiness
description: AI citation readiness score — schema, E-E-A-T, content structure, llms.txt

label: AI Citations
description: LLM mention tracking — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini

label: Site Manager
description: Browse pages, edit meta tags, add new content, manage site structure

label: SEO Health
description: H1s, meta tags, schema, duplicate content, broken links

label: Traffic
description: GA4 visitors, pageviews, sources, countries

label: Search Performance
description: Google + Bing — clicks, impressions, queries, positions

label: Competitors
description: Who ranks where — your position vs competitors for key queries

label: Content Gaps
description: Keywords with impressions but no clicks, missing topics

label: Site Tree
description: Visual page hierarchy and URL structure

label: Internal Links
description: Link graph, orphan pages, link depth analysis

label: Site Speed
description: Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse scores, performance, accessibility, SEO

label: Uptime
description: Site status, response times, uptime percentage

label: Crawl Activity
description: Bot crawls over time, indexed pages, AI crawler access

label: New Pages
description: Pages added since baseline — by type (blog, question, guide, etc.)

label: Crawl Status
description: Last crawl date, pages crawled, issues found

label: Recommendations
description: Prioritised actions to improve AI search visibility

label: Positive Signals
description: What's working — strong pages, good schema, citations gained

label: Content & Keywords
description: Content calendar, posting stats, keyword rank tracking, gap analysis

label: Ecosystem Matrix
description: Content distribution across 20 platforms — cycle status, daily posts, platform health, tokens, actions

label: Daily Audit
description: Daily 7am cross-page audit — issues per page, history trend, push live action
